##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Mineralogical Museum, Harvard University
##DESCRIPTION=Loose yellow prismatic crystals, work is done on the upper yellow crystal

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
